movie.actors: Keanu Reeves, Al Pacino, Charlize Theron, Jeffrey Jones
movie.plot: An exceptionally adept Florida lawyer is offered a job at a high-end New York City law firm with a high-end boss - the biggest opportunity of his career to date.
movie.title: The Devil's Advocate
movie.writer: Andrew Neiderman (novel), Jonathan Lemkin (screenplay), Tony Gilroy (screenplay)
